Recording.Description: This recording documents the setting and process for the creation of purchase orders for delivery remainder cancelation. Orders have to be partially received to have delivery remainders to cancel.
Recording.Name: Create purchase order for delivery remainder cancelation

Node.Description: Go to Accounts payable > Purchase orders > All purchase orders.
In the Vendor account field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
On the Action Pane, click Options.
On the Action Pane, click Options.
In the Mode of delivery field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
In the Mode of delivery field, enter or select a value.
Open Mode of delivery column filter.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
In the Mode of delivery field, enter or select a value.
Open Mode of delivery column filter.
In the Mode of delivery field, enter or select a value.
In the Mode of delivery field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
On the Action Pane, click Purchase.
In the Quantity field, enter a number.

Annotation.Description: The quantity entered should be greater than one to execute a partial reception and generate a delivery remainder.

Node.Description: In the Receive now field, enter a number.

Annotation.Description: The quantity entered should be less than the quantity ordered to produce a delivery remainder.

Node.Description: On the Action Pane, click Purchase.
On the Action Pane, click Receive.
On the Action Pane, click Receive.
On the Action Pane, click Purchase order.
On the Action Pane, click Purchase order.

RootScope.Name: Create purchase order for delivery remainder cancelation
